name: Shimagami
short_description: Shimagami is an open-world RPG with anime-style visuals and deep lore. Battle fierce monsters in action combat, solve puzzles, and conquer challenges to uncover the mysteries of Shimagami. A diverse cast of demi-human heroines awaits—find your perfect companion and shape your adventure!
detailed_description:
Unravel the Secrets of Shimagami

In a post-apocalyptic world where men have vanished, only demi-human women remain to save world from creatures. The land’s inhabitants worship a mysterious deity known as Shimagami.But what secrets lie hidden beneath this divine figure?

Shimagami is an open-world action RPG with fast-paced combat, vibrant anime-style visuals, and deep lore. Explore a vast and mysterious world, battle formidable creatures, solve intricate puzzles, and complete challenging trials to uncover the truth behind Shimagami’s legend.

Each warrior you meet is a unique demi-human heroine—ranging from fierce dragon-girls to cunning cat-girls and powerful demon-girls. Every character wields a completely different weapon, with distinct combat styles, animations, and abilities. Master their skills, adapt to different battle scenarios, and forge your own path through the ruins of a forgotten civilization.

With regular updates introducing new characters and story expansions, the journey never ends. Are you ready to uncover the truth behind Shimagami?
